creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146888
update rancid to 3.1

This patch updates rancid to 3.1.

I haven't added any scary warnings, but people should read the release notes and realize that they absolutely have to modify their router.db files and change all colons to semicolons or rancid will start deleting their routers/configs in CVS/SVN...
